message.content:
@startuml
participant "IUserService" as IUserService
    IUserService <<Interface>>
    IUserService["Create(user:User) : User"]
    IUserService["Update(userParam:User) : void"]

participant "UserService" as UserService
    UserService <<Class>>
    UserService["«readonly» _userRepository : IUserRepository"]
    UserService["UserService(userRepository:IUserRepository)"]
    UserService["Create(user:User) : User"]
    UserService["Update(userParam:User) : void"]

IUserService ..> UserService

@enduml
